tuv.seg: By opting in to receive emails you state that you are okay with Mozilla handling this info as explained in Mozilla’s <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
E-poçtalary almaga meýletin goşulmak bilen siz Mozillanyň bu maglumaty Mozillanyň <privacyLink>Ýaşyrynlyk syýasatynda</privacyLink> düşündirilişi ýaly ulanjakdygyna razylyk berýärsiňiz.
Common Voice is Mozilla's initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
“Common Voice”, Mozillanyň maşynlara hakyky adamlaryň gürleýşini öwretmäge kömek etmek üçin ornaşdyrýan başlangyjydyr.
Content available under a <licenseLink>Creative Commons license</licenseLink>
Mazmun <licenseLink>Creative Commons license</licenseLink> lisenziýasy esasynda elýeterli
Don't see your language on Common Voice yet?
Help teach machines how real people speak, donate your voice at { $link }
Maşynlara hakyky adamlaryň nähili gepleýändigini öwretmäge kömek ediň, sesiňizi { $link } peşgeş beriň
Help us build a high quality, publicly open dataset
Bize ýokary hilli, köpçülige açyk maglumat bazasyny döretmäge kömek ediň.
Help us find others to donate their voice!
Bize seslerini peşgeş berjek başga adamlary tapmaga kömek ediň!
How would you describe your accent?
I'd like to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice.
Men öňde goýlan maksat ýatlatmalary, öňegidişliklerim barada täzelenmeleri we Common Voice barada habarnamalary almak isleýärin.
Join the Common Voice mailing list
Keep track of your progress and metrics across multiple languages.
Öňegidişligiňizi we ölçegleriňizi birnäçe dilde yzarlaň.
Learn how to request it here!
Bu ýerde nädip haýyş etmelidigini görüň!
Looks like there aren't any clips to listen to in this language. Help us fill the queue by recording some now.
Bu dilde diňlemek üçin ses ýazgylary ýok ýaly. Häzir käbirlerini ýazga alyp, nobaty doldurmaga kömek ediň.
Make your submitted data as rich as possible by providing some anonymous demographic data. We de-identify all demographic data before making it public.
Käbir anonim demografik maglumatlar bilen girizen maglumatlaryňyzy mümkin boldugyndan baýlaşdyryň. Demografik maglumatlary köpçülige ýetirmezden ozal ugradanyň şahsy maglumatlaryny aýyrýarys.

Most of the data used by large companies isn’t available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we’ve launched Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open and accessible to everyone.

Uly kompaniýalar tarapyndan ulanylýan maglumatlaryň köpüsi adamlaryň köpüsine elýeterli däl. Biziň pikirimizçe bu innowasiýa bökdençlik döredýär. Şonuň üçin, biz ses tanamagy hemme kişä açyk we elýeterli etmek üçin Common Voice taslamasyna başladyk.

Most of the data used by large companies isn’t available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we’ve launched Project Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open to everyone.

Uly kompaniýalar tarapyndan ulanylýan maglumatlaryň köpüsi adamlaryň köpüsine elýeterli däl. Biziň pikirimizçe bu innowasiýa bökdençlik döredýär. Şonuň üçin, biz ses tanamagy hemme kişä açyk etmek üçin Common Voice taslamasyna başladyk.
Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Mozilla Common Voice maşynlara hakyky adamlaryň gürleýşini öwretmäge kömek etmek üçin ornaşdyrylýan başlangyçdyr.

Now you can donate your voice to help us build an open-source voice database that anyone can use to make innovative apps for devices and the web. Read a sentence to help machines learn how real people speak. Check the work of other contributors to improve the quality. It’s that simple!

Indi siz islendik adamyň enjamlar we web üçin innowatiw programmalary ulanyp bilmegi üçin bize açyk çeşme ses maglumat bazasyny gurmaga öz sesiňizi peşgeş bermek arkaly kömek edip bilersiňiz. Maşynlara hakyky adamlaryň gepleýşini öwretmek üçin bir sözlem okaň. Hili gowulandyrmak üçin başga goşantçylaryň işini barlaň. Şolar ýaly aňsat!
Optionally join on our email list for updates and new information about the project.
Taslama barada täzelenmeler we täze maglumatlar üçin islege bagly e-poçta sanawymyza goşulyň.
Overall project status: see how far we’ve come!
Taslamanyň umumy ýagdaýy: ýeten derejämize serediň!
Press play, listen & tell us: did they accurately speak the sentence below?
Aýtdyr-a basyň, diňläň we bize aýdyň: olar aşakdaky sözlemi dogry aýtdylarmy?
Press { shortcut-play-toggle } to toggle play mode
Aýtdyrmak tertibini çalyşmak üçin { shortcut-play-toggle } basyň
Profile information improves the audio data used in training speech recognition accuracy.
Profil maglumatlary sözleýiş tanamagyň takyklygyny öwretmekde ulanylýan ses maglumatlaryny gowulandyrýar.
Receive emails such as challenge and goal reminders, progress updates, and newsletters about Common Voice.
Ýumuşlar we öňde goýlan maksat ýatlatmalary, öňegidişliklerim barada täzelenmeleri we Common Voice barada habarnamalary e-poçta arkaly alyň.
Recording voice clips is an integral part of building our open dataset; some would say it's the fun part too.
Ses kliplerini ýazga almak açyk maglumat bazamyzy gurmagyň aýrylmaz bölegidir; käbirleri üçin işiň gyzykly tarapy hem şu.
See how your progress compares to other contributors all over the world.
Öňegidişligiňizi dünýäniň beýleki goşantçylary bilen deňeşdiriň.
Sign up for Common Voice newsletters, goal reminders and progress updates
Common Voice habarnamalaryna, maksat ýatlatmalaryna we öňegidişlik täzeliklerine ýazylyň
Start typing to describe your accent

Thank you for your interest in contributing to { $lang }. We work hard to get every language ready for launch and keep the teams updated via email. If you want to contribute, please provide your email below.

{ $lang } diline goşant goşmaga gyzyklananyňyz üçin sag boluň. Her bir dili işe girizmäge taýýar etmek we saklamak üçin köp zähmet çekýäris. Toparlar e-poçta arkaly täzelendi. Goşant goşmak isleseňiz aşakda e-poçtaňyzy bermegiňizi haýyş edýäris.
The number of recordings and which languages you contribute to will be public.
Ýazgylaryň sany we haýsy dillere goşant goşýandygyňyz köpçülige açyk bolar.
Validating donated clips is equally important to the Common Voice mission. Take a listen and help us create quality open source voice data.
Bagyş edilen klipleri barlamak Common Voice missiýasy üçin deň derejede möhümdir. Diňläp görüň we ýokary hilli açyk sesli maglumatlary döretmäge kömek ediň.
View your progress against personal and project goals.
Şahsy we taslama boýunça maksatlara ýetmekde öňegidişligiňizi görüň.

Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re excited about creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, developers need an extremely large amount of voice data.

Ses tebigydyr, ses adamzada mahsusdyr. Hut şonuň üçin-em biz maşynlarymyz üçin ulanyp bolýan ses tehnologiýasyny döretmek bilen gyzyklanýarys. Emma ses ulgamlaryny döretmek üçin, işläp düzüjilere örän uly mukdarda ses maglumaty gerek.
Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re fascinated with creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, an extremely large amount of voice data is required.

Ses tebigydyr, ses adamzada mahsusdyr. Hut şonuň üçin-em biz maşynlarymyz üçin ulanyp bolýan ses tehnologiýasyny döretmek bilen gyzyklanýarys. Emma ses ulgamlaryny döretmek üçin, bize örän uly mukdarda ses maglumaty gerek.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.

Biz Mozilla-da ses tehnologiýalary boýunça jemgyýeti döredýäris. Biz täzelenmeleri, täze maglumat çeşmelerini paýlaşyp habarlaşyp durmak hem-de maglumaty nähili ulanýandygyňyz barada sizden habar almak isleýäris.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.

Biz Mozilla-da ses tehnologiýalary boýunça jemgyýeti döredýäris. Biz täzelenmeleri, täze maglumat çeşmelerini paýlaşyp habarlaşyp durmak hem-de maglumaty nähili ulanýandygyňyz barada sizden habar almak isleýäris.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Biz siziň maglumatyňyzy aýratyn üns bilen işlejekdigimize söz berýäris. Bu barada <privacyLink>Ýaşyrynlyk bildirişinde</privacyLink> okaň.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Biz siziň maglumatyňyzy aýratyn üns bilen işlejekdigimize söz berýäris. Bu barada <privacyLink>Ýaşyrynlyk bildirişinde</privacyLink> okaň.
We will be in touch with more information as it becomes available.
Goşmaça maglumat elýeterli boldugyça biz siz bilen habarlaşyp durarys.
We will not make your email public.
Yes, send me emails. I’d like to stay informed about the Common Voice Project.
Hawa, maňa e-poçta iber. Men Common Voice taslamasy barada maglumat alyp durmak isleýärin.
Yes, send me emails. I'd like to stay informed about the progress of this language on Common Voice.
Hawa, maňa e-poçta iberiň. “Common Voice”-da bu diliň ösüşi barada habarly bolmak isleýärin.
You can choose to make your username public or anonymous.
Ulanyjy adyňyzy köpçülige açyk ýa-da anonim etmegi saýlap bilersiňiz.
Your username and email will not be associated with the published data.
Ulanyjy adyňyz we e-poçtaňyz neşir edilen maglumatlar bilen baglanyşykly bolmaz.
You've successfully signed up for contributing to { $language }. Thank you.
{ $language } diline goşant goşmak üçin üstünlikli ýazyldyňyz. Sag boluň.
